Professional Summary

MERN Stack and Next.js Developer with hands-on internship and professional experience in building scalable web applications. Skilled in React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, with a strong focus on clean code, performance optimization, and modern UI/UX. Experienced in developing RESTful APIs and production-ready solutions. Passionate about learning new technologies and contributing to real-world projects in fast-paced environments.
